events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: RMC (Rigid Metal Conduit) with no bushing where required. Work is staged, not yet begun. But the observed field condition is "no bushing on RMC where required." This seems like a defect - missing bushing. NEC 344.46 requires bushings on RMC where conductors would be likely to be damaged. Also 300.4(G) requires bushings on conduit where 4 AWG or larger conductors enter. Since work is staged but the condition is observed as missing bushing where required, this is non-compliant/installed-defective. Decision should be fail because non-compliant.

Let me constructthe JSON.

    "Install listed insulating bushing or fitting providing equivalent protection at each RMC termination where required",

  ],
  "rationale": "RMC requires bushings where conductors may be damaged at terminations and where 4 AWG or larger conductors enter the conduit. A staged run lacking the required bushing is non-compliant and risks conductor insulation damage during pull-in. Corrective material is an approved insulating bushing sized to the RMC trade size.",
